calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Dwight for and with (petitioner) Henrik Jones. Caitlin Carey for (beneficiary) Cahrlotte Brooks.

The Court stated that there is an issue of Elsabet not receiving sufficient notice and that there are issues with the notice not being sent directly to her. Mr. Dwight stated that he filed a supplement declaration on 8/31/18 and submitted a copy to the Court to review and clarified that "Rauner" is the family that Elsabet stayed with during her summer internship and that she has confirmed receipt of the notice. The Court stated that it will take the Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement under submission and will look at the declaration.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Wu. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-30-2018 Continued To Sep-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-24-2018 Continued To Aug-21-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Dwight for Henrik Dodd (Petitioner/Co-Trustee).
Eric Buescher for Barbera Brooks (Co-Trustee).
Caitlyn Carey and Susan Von Herrmann for Charlotte Brooks (Beneficiary).

The Court noted that part of the settlement is making a charge against the other Beneficiary's subtrust, questions whether Elsabet should be a party to the settlement and raised the issue of Elsabet being entitled to notice. Mr. Dwight stated that he filed a declaration yesterday, that there are three limited partners, that Henrik is the general partner and has exclusive control to enter into agreements, that this is restoring the partnership to its original ownership percentages and that Elsabet is aware of everything that is going on here. Ms. Von Herrmann stated that the adjustment was made to correct an error, that there are two separate Trusts and that her Client's interest was decreased. Mr. Dwight also explained that Elsabet made a capital contribution to the partnership and that her Trust received a credit for that same amount. The Court stated that before it can do anything, it at least wants to know that Elsabet knows what it is and that she agrees to it. The Petition for Order Approving Settlement Agreement is continued to August 21, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for notice, or waiver of notice to or from Elsabet.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Order Approving Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
